summary_en: 16.0M shares (2.76% of issued shares excl. treasury) - ¥2.8B upper limit - open-market purchase window Jun 1–Oct 30, 2026 - all acquired shares to be cancelled Mar 31, 2027.
title_en: Notice regarding Determination of Matters Concerning Acquisition of Own Stock and Cancellation of Own Stock
translation_en_brief: On 22 May 2026, the board of Shibusawa Logistics Corporation resolved to acquire its own shares under Article 459(1) of the Companies Act and to cancel those shares under Article 178. The company aims to enhance capital efficiency and strengthen shareholder returns as part of its medium-term management plan (FY2024–FY2026). The acquisition will target up to 16.0 million shares (2.76% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum outlay of ¥2.8 billion. Purchases will be executed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange via open-market buy from 1 June to 30 October 2026. All shares acquired under this program are scheduled for cancellation on 31 March 2027. The company notes that market conditions may result in partial or full non-execution of the plan.
